basic_details.job_title: ICMR-NIRBID Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR-National Institute for Research On Blood and Immune Disorders
basic_details.short_information: ICMR–National Institute for Research on Blood and Immune Disorders (ICMR-NIRBID) Young Professional-II (Scientific) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICMR-NIRBID. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR-NIRBID Young Professional-II (Scientific) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Life Sciences/BAMS, BSMS, MD in AYUSH with at least 55% marks and 03 years of post-qualification experience in a related field.
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Life Sciences/BAMS, BSMS, MD in AYUSH with at least 55% marks and 03 years of post-qualification experience in a related field.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emolument of Young Professional-II will be Rs. 42,000/- per month. Monthly remuneration will be released based on explicit certificate from Head of Department/Section on satisfactory performance and attendance. TA/DA will be admissible for undertaking domestic tour for official work.

selection_process: Screening of applications by a committee (if numbers are more) Interview of shortlisted candidates Written test and assignment-based assessment test (if necessary)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR-NIRBID to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR-NIRBID Young Professional-II (Scientific) Job 2026 Notification PD

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR-NIRBID Young Professional-II (Scientific) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 15th June 2026, up to 05:00 P.M.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II (Scientific) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Life Sciences or BAMS, BSMS, MD in AYUSH with at least 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 03 years of post-qualification experience in a related field is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II (Scientific) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for this position is not more than 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II (Scientific) role?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration offered is Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ICMR-NIRBID Young Professional-II (Scientific) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the official ICMR-NIRBID website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only 1 vacancy for the Young Professional-II (Scientific) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve screening of applications, interviews, and potentially a written test or assignment-based assessment.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: Links to the official notification and the online application portal are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
